name: Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc.
summary: Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc. is a Maryland-incorporated REIT that owns and asset-manages upper upscale and luxury hotels. As of December 31, 2025, the company owned 14 hotels comprising 6,999 rooms across 7 states and Washington, DC. Hotels are operated by third-party managers including Marriott, Hyatt, Four Seasons, Hilton, Montage, Sage, and Singh Hospitality under long-term management agreements, targeting convention, urban, and resort destinations.

products.name: Upper Upscale Hotel Portfolio
products.description: Ownership and asset management of upper upscale hotels in convention, urban, and resort destinations across the U.S.

products.name: Luxury Hotel Portfolio
products.description: Ownership and asset management of luxury hotels including independently operated Oceans Edge Resort & Marina.
